focus_points.label: Quality bar in concrete, usable terms
focus_points.reason: What “good” looks like in his brand design work right now, with examples, so feedback doesn’t stay abstract.

focus_points.label: Whether feedback turned into behavior changes
focus_points.reason: Whether the prior feedback he’s received translated into specific changes in his outputs, or stayed at the level of general advice.

focus_points.label: How he defines “good work” at his level
focus_points.reason: What he believes the expectations and success bar are for a junior brand designer, so you can calibrate and reduce subjectivity.

focus_points.label: Near-term growth focus and what blocks it
focus_points.reason: What he feels blocked on in his development, and which one practice for the next few weeks would move him fastest.
